headline: Target Announces Voting Results from 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) today announced voting results from its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders held on June 10, 2026 ("Annual Meeting"). Shareholders elected all 12 nominees for the board of directors, ratified the appointment of Target's independent registered public accounting firm, approved the advisory "Say on Pay" management proposal, approved the Amended and Restated Target Corporation 2020 Long-Term Incentive Plan, and rejected three shareholder proposals.

headline: Why Target (TGT) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of general merchandise retailer Target (NYSE:TGT) jumped 3.3% in the afternoon session after President Trump reversed course on a military escalation against Iran that wiped $1.2 trillion from the market earlier in the day.
